message:
feat: major OpenAPI schema generation and concurrent connection handling

This commit delivers two significant enhancements to fastapi_rust:
(1) comprehensive Rust enum support in OpenAPI schema generation, and
(2) standalone concurrent connection handling for spawned tasks.

## OpenAPI Enum Schema Generation (fastapi-openapi, fastapi-macros)

Adds full support for deriving OpenAPI schemas from Rust enums following
serde's serialization conventions:

Schema types added:
- EnumSchema: new schema variant for oneOf/anyOf/allOf constructs
- Discriminator: support for tagged union discriminators with mapping
- Schema::one_of(), any_of(), all_of(): builder methods for union schemas
- Schema::string_enum(): for unit-variant-only enums (string enum values)
- Schema::one_of_with_discriminator(): tagged unions with property name/mapping

Macro enhancements (openapi.rs):
- is_all_unit_variants(): detect pure string enums vs mixed enums
- generate_variant_schema(): per-variant schema generation
  - Unit variants → string const schema with enum_values
  - Tuple variants → object with variant name key, inner type value
  - Struct variants → object with variant name key, nested object value
- Handles serde's default external tagging format

PrimitiveSchema extended:
- Added minimum, maximum fields for numeric range constraints
- Added enum_values field for string enum schemas

## Concurrent Connection Handling (fastapi-http)

Refactored connection handling to support spawned task execution:

- handle_connection_inner(): new standalone async function that doesn't
  require TcpServer reference, enabling use from spawned tasks
- Added imports: RuntimeState, SpawnError, TaskHandle from asupersync
- Added Scope import for structured concurrency patterns
- Mutex import for shared state in concurrent contexts

The inner function contains the full request loop:
- Parser state management
- Keep-alive timeout handling via asupersync::time::timeout
- Request ID generation with configurable budget
- Host header validation
- Response writing

This separation allows the server to spawn connection handlers while
maintaining the same functionality as the inline implementation.

## New test infrastructure
- Added crates/fastapi-openapi/tests/ directory for schema validation tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
